title: Notebook Template
description: Schema for OpenELIS-Global notebook template configuration files loaded by NotebookTemplateConfigurationHandler

title.description: Unique template title. Used as the lookup key — if a template with this title exists it will be updated.

workflowType.description: Frontend workflow routing key (e.g. 'tuberculosis', 'gbd'). Used by PAGE_TYPE_REGISTRY.

departments.description: Test section names to link this template to. Warns if a name is not found in the DB.

status.description: Template status. Defaults to ACTIVE if omitted or invalid.

order.description: 1-based page order within the template. Must be unique within the template (validation enforced at startup; duplicates will cause configuration to be rejected with an error).

pageType.description: Page type for routing/storage categorization (e.g. BRANCHING, CHILD_SAMPLE_CREATION, STORAGE_ASSIGNMENT, BULK_DATA_ENTRY). Enables isRoutingPage() and isStoragePage() checks.

data.description: Optional lab-specific page configuration data. Stored as JSONB in database. Example: {"sampleTypesEndpoint": "/rest/notebook/{lab}/sample-types", "columns": [...], "validValues": {...}}. Structure depends on page purpose and frontend component expectations.
